title: Flurry
description: Some wintery additions for your server
body:
Snowball fights and particle delight!

## Snowball Fights

Two snowball fight modes: knockback and freezetag.

Configuration for knockback amount, bonus sprint knockback, freezing time, extra particles on impact.

Make a PvE snowball fight with Strays by enabling straySnowballs.

## Snowy Footprints

Players can have snow particle trails if they have a specific item in their inventory. To set the item, hold it in your hand and use "/flurry set". (Works well with custom name/lore items).*

You can use "/flurry" to give yourself the particle item or "/flurry give <player>" to give it to another player. (Saves you the time of writing out a whole give command each time for a special item.)

Additionally, Frosty the Snow Boss will drop the particle item, allowing players a way to get it themselves.

## Frosty the Snow Boss
A new "boss" fight awaits your players by naming a snow golem "Frosty". You can configure whether or not this feature is enabled and how difficult Frosty will be to beat.

Frosty requires a resource pack which can either be downloaded automatically for players by the plugin (will override any server resource packs currently active), or you can download it [here](https://packcdn.fg83.net/flurry_rp.zip) and distribute to players however you wish. Note that the resource pack is designed for use with Optifine/Optifabric or the Entity Texture Features mod.


Permissions:
- "/flurry" - flurry.item.give
- "/flurry give <player>" - flurry.item.give
- "/flurry set" - flurry.item.set

*Particle item changes may require a server restart
